prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
You've got this! Taking the first step is often the hardest part, but think of the immense satisfaction and relief you'll feel once you dive in and make progress. Hard tasks can seem daunting, but remember that they are achievable. Break the task down into smaller, manageable chunks, and tackle each piece step by step. Focus on the present and don't let your mind wander to potential obstacles. Your effort and determination will pay off, and soon this task will be complete!

Believe in yourself and your abilities. Starting early means you can take your time and produce your best work without rushing. Stay positive, keep a clear mind, and get ready to conquer this challenge. You're about to demonstrate incredible discipline and productivity, so go ahead and begin — your future self will thank you for it!
